title: Pursuit to Algiers
overview: After the King of Rovenia has been assassinated, Holmes and Watson are engaged to escort his son to Europe via Algiers, aboard a transatlantic ocean liner which also carries a number of  suspicious persons, any of whom may be involved in a plot to also assassinate him.
